'''ngadava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ufufunyane|ufufunyane]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-d-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ufufunyane|ufufunyane]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngadava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngædævæth|ngædævæth]] || [[word:ngædævæj|ngædævæj]] || [[word:ngædævæsh|ngædævæsh]] || [[word:ngædævæ|ngædævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngadadavath|ngadadavath]] || [[word:ngadadavaj|ngadadavaj]] || [[word:ngadadavash|ngadadavash]] || [[word:ngadadava|ngadadava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngadavath|ngadavath]] || [[word:ngadavaj|ngadavaj]] || [[word:ngadavash|ngadavash]] || [[word:ngadava|ngadava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadafvath|ngadafvath]] || [[word:ngadafvaj|ngadafvaj]] || [[word:ngadafvash|ngadafvash]] || [[word:ngadafvaf|ngadafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngadavatha|ngadavatha]] || [[word:ngadavaja|ngadavaja]] || [[word:ngadavasha|ngadavasha]] || [[word:ngadavaka|ngadavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngadavath|ngadavath]] || [[word:ngadavaj|ngadavaj]] || [[word:ngadavash|ngadavash]] || [[word:ngadava|ngadava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngadavathal|ngadavathal]] || [[word:ngadavajal|ngadavajal]] || [[word:ngadavashal|ngadavashal]] || [[word:ngadavakal|ngadavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngadavathatha|ngadavathatha]] || [[word:ngadavajaja|ngadavajaja]] || [[word:ngadavashasha|ngadavashasha]] || [[word:ngadavaka|ngadavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngadavathan|ngadavathan]] || [[word:ngadavajan|ngadavajan]] || [[word:ngadavashan|ngadavashan]] || [[word:ngadavakan|ngadavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngadavathaoro|ngadavathaoro]] || [[word:ngadavajaoro|ngadavajaoro]] || [[word:ngadavashaoro|ngadavashaoro]] || [[word:ngadavakaoro|ngadavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
